title: TF-IDF Mathematics
content:
# TF-IDF Mathematics

## 1. Formulas
$$\text{TF-IDF}(t, d) = \text{TF}(t, d) \times \text{IDF}(t)$$
$$\text{IDF}(t) = \ln \frac{M}{1 + \text{DF}(t)} + 1$$

## 2. Sublinear Scaling
$$\text{TF}_{sub} = 1 + \ln(\text{TF}) \quad (\text{for } \text{TF} > 0)$$

## 3. L2 Normalization
$$\mathbf{d}_{norm} = \frac{\mathbf{d}}{\|\mathbf{d}\|_2}$$
